message:
✨ Add stat block click handlers to GitOps and Logs dashboards

Add drill-down click handlers to stat blocks on:
- GitOps: drill to helm releases and operator subscriptions
- Logs: drill to events by type (warning, normal, recent)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
